title: Classifier-agent output (Item 9 of v2.2.5)
description: Structured JSON the classifier-agent emits in the context phase. Consumed by the classifier step which writes the fields into state.decisions + state.task_short.

task_short.description: Short kebab-case slug summarising the task — used for filenames, branch names, commit subjects.

refs_to_load.description: Senior-pattern references (filenames from agents/references/) to inject into agent prompts.

security_needed.description: Whether the security reviewer agent should run for this task.

antipattern_rules_applicable.description: Anti-pattern rule identifiers from CLAUDE.md that the implementer should respect.
